summary: Add auth gate to Proper Wine Pour app: update layout.tsx, set auth: true in registry, add smoke tests
implementation:
1. apps/web/app/apps/proper-wine-pour/layout.tsx: Add `import { requireAppLayoutAccess } from "@/lib/require-app-layout-access"`, make the default export function `async`, add `await requireAppLayoutAccess("proper-wine-pour")` as the first line of the function body.
2. apps/web/lib/app-registry.ts line 74: Change `auth: false` to `auth: true` for the proper-wine-pour entry.
3. Create apps/web/app/apps/proper-wine-pour/__tests__/layout.test.tsx: Mock `@/lib/require-app-layout-access`, test four cases: (a) calls requireAppLayoutAccess with 'proper-wine-pour', (b) redirects unauthenticated to /login, (c) redirects unauthorized to /unauthorized, (d) renders children for authenticated user. Follow exact pattern from dad-joke-of-the-day tests.

testing.reason: Auth gate changes app behavior — unauthenticated/unauthorized users are now redirected. Smoke tests verify the guard is wired correctly.

verification.reason: Auth gate is server-side redirect logic tested via unit tests. No UI changes to verify in a browser — the layout markup is unchanged.
